## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Linked Issue

<!-- Use: Closes #123 / Fixes #123 / Resolves #123 -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore / Maintenance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test

## Validation

- [ ] `dart format --output=none --set-exit-if-changed .`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`

## Screenshots / Recordings (UI Changes Only)

<!-- Add screenshots or short recordings for visual changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope matches the linked issue
- [ ] Tests updated or not applicable (explained)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/setup changed
- [ ] CI checks pass
